title: Reporting Phishing or Suspicious Emails
text:
Q: How do I report a phishing or suspicious email?
A: Step 1: Open your email client (Outlook, Gmail, etc.) and locate the suspicious email. Step 2: Do not click on any links or download attachments from the email. Step 3: In Outlook, right-click on the email and select 'Report Phishing'. In Gmail, click on the three dots in the top right corner and select 'Report phishing'. Step 4: If your email client does not have a reporting feature, forward the email to the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com. Step 5: Include a brief description of why you believe the email is suspicious. Step 6: Delete the email from your inbox after reporting it. Step 7: Monitor your account for any unusual activity and report any findings to IT immediately.
